chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Bail Appl No.813 of 2024 05.06.2024 Mr. Zain ul Abdin, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Abida Parveen Channar, Spl. Prosecutor ANF. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant is seeking post arrest bail in Crime No.07/2023 U/s 9 3(C), CNSA, registered at P.S. ANF Clifton, Karachi. 2. Applicant alongwith co-accused Din Muhammad were arrested on 13.02.2023 on suspicion and from each of them two K.Gs. Charas was recovered. Learned counsel has filed this application on the ground that so far no witness has been examined and trial court is lying vacant. Learned Special prosecutor ANF has proposed that this case may be transferred to Special Court CNS-III for expeditious trial. This proposal has been accepted by learned defence counsel. 3. Accordingly, this application is dismissed. However, Spl. Case No.19/2023 is withdrawn from the file of learned Special Court CNS-II and transferred to Special Court CNS-III, Karachi with directions to examine the material witnesses within a period of two months, after which in any case, the applicant would be at liberty to repeat his application for the same relief, which, if filed, shall be decided on its own merits. The bail application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E A.K
